overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic urban underpass tunnel from the game Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves steadily forward from a dark artificially-lit enclosed section toward a bright exit, transitioning through a semi-open area with skylights. Occasional vehicles pass on the right-side road.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed urban underpass with vehicle lane

events.description: futuristic sedan passes by on the right-side road
second vehicle passes by on the right-side road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the pedestrian walkway of the underpass

entered.detail: smooth dark concrete wall with vertical panel texture
horizontal strips of warm yellow LED lights mounted on the left wall
large cylindrical metal ventilation pipe running along the ceiling
long white fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the ceiling
dark asphalt vehicle lane with yellow dividing line

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a fully enclosed concrete underpass tunnel. The left wall features distinctive yellow accent lighting strips while the ceiling has industrial fluorescent tubes. The space is empty of pedestrians but occasional futuristic vehicles pass on the right-side road. The atmosphere is cool-toned and artificially lit.

events.description: bright daylight becomes visible at the tunnel exit ahead
vehicle with headlights on passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the tunnel toward the visible exit light

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving past the camera position on the right lane

entered.detail: bright white-blue daylight visible at the end of the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The walk continues through the underpass as the tunnel exit becomes visible ahead as a bright light source. The yellow accent lights on the left wall end, and the large ventilation duct passes overhead closer to the camera. A vehicle passes on the right-side road. The environment remains enclosed but the lighting begins to transition toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: semi-open underpass with skylights and commercial displays

events.description: tunnel ceiling opens up to reveal skylights and natural sky above
natural sunlight floods the tunnel floor creating bright patches

agents.ego_description: walking toward the tunnel exit through the sunlit section with skylights overhead

entered.detail: large rectangular openings in the ceiling revealing blue sky and sunlight
bright sunlight casting onto the walkway from the skylights above
illuminated shop windows and digital displays along the right wall
large glowing digital screen visible at the tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to a semi-open underpass with large skylights in the ceiling allowing natural sunlight to flood the space. The artificial fluorescent lights fade as natural light dominates. Storefront displays and digital billboards become visible on the right side as the camera approaches the tunnel exit. The ventilation duct recedes to the left as the architecture opens up.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a futuristic concrete underpass that transforms from a dark, artificially lit tunnel into a bright, semi-open urban corridor. It begins in a cool-toned enclosed space characterized by industrial fluorescent tubes and yellow accent lighting strips on the left wall, while futuristic vehicles pass on the adjacent road. As the camera moves forward, the yellow lights fade and a large ventilation duct passes overhead, drawing the eye toward a bright light source appearing at the tunnel's exit. The scene then opens into a semi-open area where large skylights allow natural sunlight to flood the space, causing the artificial lighting to recede. Finally, the architecture expands as the ventilation duct shifts to the left, revealing digital billboards and storefront displays on the right as the camera approaches the exit.
